change.purpose: Collect credential-free DNS, HTTP, redirect, and research-surface identity evidence for the canonical Cloudflare Pages candidate while keeping control-plane and exact-commit proof separate.

verification.method: isolated Node test run using byte-identical implementation and test logic

runtime_probe.interpretation: The execution environment could not access DNS. This does not establish that the hostname is globally unresolved.

claim_boundary: A successful public identity probe would establish only that the candidate hostname serves the expected research surface at probe time. It would not establish Cloudflare control-plane ownership, deployment provenance, or exact source commit.
privacy: No credentials, private chat, health information, diagnosis, treatment claim, payment logic, or conversion logic were introduced.
